channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-836] Don't allow lustre mount with disabled ldiskfs journal
item.summary: Don't allow lustre mount with disabled ldiskfs journal

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Xyratex-bug-id: MRP-118

Integrated in lustre-dev » x86_64,client,el6,inkernel #340
LU-836 ldiskfs: require ldiskfs filesystem has journal (Revision 32a4e45e0e5ce912b7a03c703f42a70fe5781084)

Result = SUCCESS
Oleg Drokin : 32a4e45e0e5ce912b7a03c703f42a70fe5781084
Files :

  • lustre/mgs/mgs_fs.c
  • lustre/mgc/mgc_request.c
  • lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh
  • lustre/lvfs/fsfilt_ext3.c
  • lustre/obdfilter/filter.c
  • lustre/mds/handler.c

Integrated in lustre-master » i686,client,el5,ofa #531
LU-836 ldiskfs: require ldiskfs filesystem has journal (Revision 32a4e45e0e5ce912b7a03c703f42a70fe5781084)

Result = FAILURE
Oleg Drokin : 32a4e45e0e5ce912b7a03c703f42a70fe5781084
Files :

  • lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh
  • lustre/mds/handler.c
  • lustre/obdfilter/filter.c
  • lustre/mgc/mgc_request.c
  • lustre/lvfs/fsfilt_ext3.c
  • lustre/mgs/mgs_fs.c

/dev/md1 was created with lustre_config as ost with journal device /dev/md9p2. then, using tune2fs -O ^has_journal /dev/md1 journaling was disabled. After this, mount -t lustre /dev/md1 /mnt/data1 produce stable kernel panic

stacktrace:

md1: detected capacity change from 0 to 42949672960
md1: unknown partition table
unknown partition table
md: minimum guaranteed speed: 1000 KB/sec/disk.
md: using maximum available idle IO bandwidth (but not more than 200000 KB/sec) for resync.
md: using 128k window, over a total of 20971520 blocks.
LDISKFS-fs (md0): journal UUID does not match
LDISKFS-fs (md1): warning: mounting unchecked fs, running e2fsck is recommended
LustreError: 3650:0:(obd_mount.c:1345:server_kernel_mount()) premount /dev/md0:0x0 ldiskfs failed: -22 Is the ldiskfs module available?
LustreError: 3650:0:(obd_mount.c:1667:server_fill_super()) Unable to mount device /dev/md0: -22
LustreError: 3650:0:(obd_mount.c:2141:lustre_fill_super()) Unable to mount (-22)
LDISKFS-fs (md1): mounted filesystem without journal
LDISKFS-fs (md1): warning: mounting unchecked fs, running e2fsck is recommended
LDISKFS-fs (md1): mounted filesystem without journal
Lustre: 3708:0:(sec.c:1474:sptlrpc_import_sec_adapt()) import MGC192.168.0.2@o2ib->MGC192.168.0.2@o2ib_0 netid 50000: select flavor null
Lustre: MGC192.168.0.2@o2ib: Reactivating import
Lustre: 4032:0:(ldlm_lib.c:1893:target_recovery_init()) RECOVERY: service vostok-OST0003, 1 recoverable clients, last_transno 33
LustreError: 4037:0:(ldlm_lib.c:1730:target_recovery_thread()) vostok-OST0003: started recovery thread pid 4037
BUG: unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at 0000000000000029

It would be good if this bug at least had some comment in it.

Presumably you are concerned with filesystems formatted as ext4 without "-j", or is there some other issue here?
CODE: http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,1687
